en.ahmedali: And a crowd of the later.
en.ahmedraza: And a large group from the latter.
en.arberry: and a throng of the later folk.
en.daryabadi: And a multitude from the later generations.
en.hilali: And a multitude of those (on the Right Hand) will be from the later times (generations).
en.itani: And a throng from the latecomers.
en.maududi: and also a large throng from those of later times.
en.mubarakpuri: And a multitude of those will be from the later generations.
en.pickthall: And a multitude of those of later time.
en.qarai: and a multitude from the latter [ones].
en.qaribullah: and a multitude of the later people.
en.sahih: And a company of the later peoples.
en.sarwar: and many from the later generations.
en.shakir: And a numerous company from among the last.
en.wahiduddin: and a large group of those of later times.
en.yusufali: And a (goodly) number from those of later times.
fa.ayati: و گروهى كه از پى آمده‌اند.
fa.ghomshei: و جمعی از امت رسول آخر زمان هستند.
fa.khorramdel: و گروه زیادی از پسینیان (گروندگان به هر دینی از ادیان الهی). [[«الآخِرِینَ»: پسینیان. آیندگان. اشخاصی که بعد از روزها و سالهای دعوت هر پیغمبری، ایمان آورده‌اند و مؤمنانه زیسته‌اند.]]
